Package com.csl.intercom.cslscan

Class ScanApiHandler

java.lang.Object
com.csl.intercom.cslscan.ApiHandler
com.csl.intercom.cslscan.ScanApiHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public class ScanApiHandler extends ApiHandler
Class to handle communication with CSL-Scan's HTTP API.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class com.csl.intercom.cslscan.ApiHandler

    url

  • Constructor Details

    • ScanApiHandler

      public ScanApiHandler()

  • Method Details

    • addEntity

      public JsonApiResponse addEntity(Device device)
      Create a new device in the scanner
      Parameters:
      device - A Json containing the device to add. Fields 'id', 'name' and 'ip' are required.
      Returns:
      A Json containing the newly created device, as handed by the scanner

    • listEntities

      public JsonApiResponse listEntities()
      Get the list of configured entities in the scanner.
      Returns:
      A Json array containing the all the configured entities in the scanner.

    • getEntity

      public JsonApiResponse getEntity(String id)
      Get a specific entity.
      Parameters:
      id - The unique identifier created by the scanner, as returned at creation or in a list.
      Returns:
      A Json containing the specified entity.

    • updateEntity

      public JsonApiResponse updateEntity(Device device)
      Change fields in an already existing device, overwriting every field.
      Parameters:
      device - A Json with the device's new information.
      Returns:
      The old version of the device, not reflecting the changes made.

    • createOrUpdateEntity

      public JsonApiResponse createOrUpdateEntity(Device device)

    • deleteEntities

      public List<String> deleteEntities(List<Pair<String,OffsetDateTime>> deletedDevices) throws Exception
      Throws:
      Exception

    • deleteEntity

      public JsonApiResponse deleteEntity(String id)
      Delete an entity from the scanner.
      Parameters:
      id - The unique identifier of the entity, as returned at creation or in a list.
      Returns:
      An empty object on success, an error message on failure.

    • getEntityCpes

      public JsonApiResponse getEntityCpes(String id)
      Get all the SNMP objects discovered on a particular entity.
      Parameters:
      id - The unique identifier of the entity, as returned at creation or in a list.
      Returns:
      A Json array containing all the SNMP objects discovered so far by the scanner on this entity.

    • getScanStatus

      public JsonApiResponse getScanStatus(String id)
      Get the status of a specific scan task.
      Parameters:
      id - The unique id of the task.
      Returns:
      The status of the scan.

    • getEntityScanStatus

      public JsonApiResponse getEntityScanStatus(String id)
      Get the status of an entity's scan
      Parameters:
      id - The entity's unique id.
      Returns:
      The status of the scan.

    • getStatus

      public JsonApiResponse getStatus()
      Fetch CSL-Scan's status.
      Returns:
      A JsonApiResponse with CSL-Scan's status as it was received, or with an error in the 'error' field.

    • testConnection

      public JsonApiResponse testConnection(String deviceUuid, String connectionUuid)
      Test if an existing connection is valid.
      Parameters:
      deviceUuid - The uuid of the device to test.
      connectionUuid - The uuid of the connection to test.
      Returns:
      A JsonApiResponse with CSL-Scan's response.

    • testConnection

      public JsonApiResponse testConnection(Device device)
      Test if a connection is valid. The connection does not need to exist in CSL-Scan.
      Parameters:
      device - The device to test. We assume it contains a connection. Only the first connection will be tested.
      Returns:
      A JsonApiResponse with CSL-Scan's response.

    • deleteCpeItemFromScan

      public void deleteCpeItemFromScan(String id)
      Request the deletion of a CPE Item to CSL-Scan.
      Parameters:
      id - The uuid of the CPE Item to delete.

    • deleteCpeItemsFromScan

      public void deleteCpeItemsFromScan(List<Pair<String,OffsetDateTime>> deletedCpes, boolean hardDelete)
      Request multiple deletions of CPE Items to CSL-Scan.
      Parameters:
      deletedCpes - The list of CPE Items to delete.
      hardDelete - Whether to hard-delete the CPE Items (i.e. actually remove them from the DB) or to soft-delete them (i.e. mark them as deleted in the DB).

    • deleteCpeItemsBeforeDate

      public void deleteCpeItemsBeforeDate(OffsetDateTime date, boolean deleteAll)

    • deleteMicrosoftKBFromScan

      public void deleteMicrosoftKBFromScan(String id)
      Request the deletion of a MicrosoftKB to CSL-Scan.
      Parameters:
      id - The uuid of the MicrosoftKB to delete.

    • deleteMicrosoftKBsFromScan

      public void deleteMicrosoftKBsFromScan(List<Pair<String,OffsetDateTime>> deletedMicrosoftKBs, boolean hardDelete)
      Request multiple deletions of MicrosoftKB to CSL-Scan.
      Parameters:
      deletedMicrosoftKBs - The list of MicrosoftKB to delete.
      hardDelete - Whether to hard-delete the MicrosoftKB (i.e. actually remove them from the DB) or to soft-delete them (i.e. mark them as deleted in the DB).

    • deleteMicrosoftKBsBeforeDate

      public void deleteMicrosoftKBsBeforeDate(OffsetDateTime date, boolean deleteAll)

    • getCpeItemChangesSince

      public List<CpeItem> getCpeItemChangesSince(OffsetDateTime date, int limit, int offset)
      Get the CPE items that have changed since the specified date.
      Parameters:
      date - The date to start receiving notifications. May be null to retrieve all the items.
      Returns:
      A List<MicrosoftKB> array containing the CPE items that have changed since the specified date, or all the items if date was null.

    • getCpeItemChangesSince

      public List<CpeItem> getCpeItemChangesSince(OffsetDateTime date)

    • getMicrosoftKbChangesSince

      public List<MicrosoftKB> getMicrosoftKbChangesSince(OffsetDateTime date, int limit, int offset)
      Get the KBs that have changed since the specified date.
      Parameters:
      date - The date to start receiving notifications. May be null to retrieve all the items.
      Returns:
      A List<MicrosoftKB> containing the KBs that have changed since the specified date, or all the items if date was null.

    • getMicrosoftKbChangesSince

      public List<MicrosoftKB> getMicrosoftKbChangesSince(OffsetDateTime date)

    • getEntityByName

      public Json getEntityByName(String name)
      Contact the scan service to retrieve an entity through by its name. Stops at the first match, thus ignores extra results if the name is duplicated.
      Parameters:
      name - The name to seek in the entities
      Returns:
      null if the scan service is down, "" if the name was not found.

    • getEntityByIp

      public Json getEntityByIp(String ipAddress)
      Contact the scan service to retrieve an entity through by its IP address. Stops at the first match, thus ignores extra results if the IP address is duplicated.
      Parameters:
      ipAddress - The IP address to seek in the entities
      Returns:
      null if the scan service is down, "" if the address was not found.

    • getAllEntityHttpConnections

      public List<EntityHttpConnection> getAllEntityHttpConnections(boolean visibleOnly)
      Get the list of EntityHttpConnection objects from CSL-Scan.
      Returns:
      A List<EntityHttpConnection> containing all the EntityHttpConnection objects from CSL-Scan.

    • getAllEntityHttpConnectionsUuids

      public List<String> getAllEntityHttpConnectionsUuids()

    • getEntityHttpConnection

      public EntityHttpConnection getEntityHttpConnection(String uuid, boolean visibleOnly)
      Get an EntityHttpConnection object from CSL-Scan from its uuid.
      Parameters:
      uuid - The uuid of the EntityHttpConnection object to retrieve.
      Returns:
      The EntityHttpConnection object from CSL-Scan with the specified uuid.

    • deleteEntityHttpConnection

      public JsonApiResponse deleteEntityHttpConnection(String uuid)
      Delete an EntityHttpConnection object from CSL-Scan from its uuid.
      Parameters:
      uuid - The uuid of the EntityHttpConnection object to delete.
      Returns:
      The JsonApiResponse from CSL-Scan.

    • createEntityHttpConnection

      public JsonApiResponse createEntityHttpConnection(EntityHttpConnection entityHttpConnection)

    • updateEntityHttpConnection

      public JsonApiResponse updateEntityHttpConnection(EntityHttpConnection entityHttpConnection)

    • getLastLastEntityUpdateDate

      public OffsetDateTime getLastLastEntityUpdateDate()
      Get the last updated date of the devices in CSL-Scan.
      Returns:
      The date of the last entities update in CSL-Scan.

    • getLastMicrosoftKbsUpdateDate

      public OffsetDateTime getLastMicrosoftKbsUpdateDate()
      Get the last updated date of the entities in CSL-Scan.
      Returns:
      The date of the last entities update in CSL-Scan.

    • getLastCpeItemsDeletionDate

      public OffsetDateTime getLastCpeItemsDeletionDate()
      Get the last deletion date of the CPE items in CSL-Scan.
      Returns:
      The date of the last CPE items deletion in CSL-Scan.

    • getLastEntitiesDeletionDate

      public OffsetDateTime getLastEntitiesDeletionDate()
      Get the last deletion date of the entities in CSL-Scan.
      Returns:
      The date of the last entities deletion in CSL-Scan.

    • getLastMicrosoftKbsDeletionDate

      public OffsetDateTime getLastMicrosoftKbsDeletionDate()
      Get the last deletion date of the Microsoft KBs in CSL-Scan.
      Returns:
      The date of the last Microsoft KBs deletion in CSL-Scan.

    • setLastCpeItemsDeletionDate

      public void setLastCpeItemsDeletionDate(OffsetDateTime date) throws Exception
      Set the last updated date of the devices in CSL-Scan.
      Parameters:
      date - The date of the last entities update in CSL-Scan.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the request failed (ie status code != 200).

    • setLastEntitiesDeletionDate

      public void setLastEntitiesDeletionDate(OffsetDateTime date) throws Exception
      Set the last deletion date of the entities in CSL-Scan.
      Parameters:
      date - The date of the last entities deletion in CSL-Scan.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the request failed (ie status code != 200).

    • setLastMicrosoftKbsDeletionDate

      public void setLastMicrosoftKbsDeletionDate(OffsetDateTime date) throws Exception
      Set the last deletion date of the Microsoft KBs in CSL-Scan.
      Parameters:
      date - The date of the last Microsoft KBs deletion in CSL-Scan.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the request failed (ie status code != 200).

    • dropCollection

      public void dropCollection(ScanCollection collection) throws Exception
      Drop a collection in CSL-Scan.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • dropAllCollections

      public void dropAllCollections() throws Exception
      Drop all collections in CSL-Scan.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testEntityHttpConnection

      public EntityHttpConnectionTestResult testEntityHttpConnection(String entityHttpConnectionId, EntityHttpConnection entityHttpConnection, String deviceId, Device device, Integer connectionId) throws Exception
      Throws:
      Exception

    • getPredefinedHttpVariables

      public JsonApiResponse getPredefinedHttpVariables()

    • getDiscoveryCron

      public Json getDiscoveryCron()
      Get the current cron expression for the periodic discovery task.
      Returns:
      The cron expression for the periodic discovery task.

    • setDiscoveryCron

      public void setDiscoveryCron(String cron, DynamicDiscoveryFrequencyOption frequencyOption) throws Exception
      Set the cron expression for the periodic discovery task.
      Parameters:
      cron - The new cron expression for the periodic discovery task.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the request failed (ie status code != 200).

    • isDiscoveryCronActive

      public boolean isDiscoveryCronActive() throws Exception
      Get the status of the periodic discovery task.
      Returns:
      Whether the periodic discovery task is active.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the request failed (ie status code != 200).

    • setDiscoveryCronActive

      public void setDiscoveryCronActive(boolean active) throws Exception
      Set the status of the periodic discovery task.
      Parameters:
      active - Whether the periodic discovery task should be active.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the request failed (ie status code != 200).

    • cancelScan

      public void cancelScan() throws Exception
      Cancel the current scan (if any).
      Throws:
      Exception

    • importBsonFile

      public ImportQuery importBsonFile(Path bsonFilePath, boolean shouldDrop) throws Exception
      Start a new import task in CSL-Scan.
      Parameters:
      bsonFilePath - The path to the bson file to import.
      Returns:
      The status of the import task.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the request failed.

    • requestExportHttpTemplates

      public ExportQuery requestExportHttpTemplates() throws Exception
      Request the export of the http templates from the scanner.
      Returns:
      The export query.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the request failed.

    • getExportQueryStatus

      public ExportQuery getExportQueryStatus(UUID uuid)
      Get the status of an export query.
      Parameters:
      uuid - The uuid of the export query.
      Returns:
      The new export query.

    • getExportQueryStatus

      public ExportQuery getExportQueryStatus(ExportQuery exportQuery)
      Get the status of an export query.
      Parameters:
      exportQuery - The export query to get the status of.
      Returns:
      The new export query.

      public void deleteExportFile(UUID uuid)

    • deleteExportFile

      public void deleteExportFile(ExportQuery exportQuery)

      Throws:

      TimeoutException
